build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run icons:generate && npm run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.github.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com

bundle.shortDescription: Reduce AI-agent token consumption with local multi-engine optimization.
bundle.longDescription: A local-first desktop optimization layer that routes AI coding-agent context through compatible compression engines, prevents duplicate processing, measures delivered context reduction, and keeps full results locally recoverable.
